description_long: This is a tall, open shelving unit with a minimalist, industrial design, featuring a black metal frame and several staggered, rectangular shelves. The shelves are arranged in an asymmetrical, stepped pattern, creating a visually dynamic look and offering various compartment sizes for storage or display. The frame is composed of thin, straight metal rods forming a rectangular outline, with horizontal supports for each shelf. The open sides and back allow for visibility and access from multiple angles, making it suitable for use as a room divider or against a wall. The overall construction appears sturdy, with each shelf capable of supporting moderate weight. The design is modern and functional, ideal for urban environments such as lofts, offices, or public spaces.
description: A tall, open, black metal shelving unit with staggered shelves in an asymmetrical, modern design. The frame is minimalist and industrial, with open sides and back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height and staggered arrangement of the shelves, with all compartments visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow depth of the unit and the thinness of the metal frame and shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the open back and shelf layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and open construction.
